pi_items.source: HTTP HEAD request returns 200 OK; website is live and accessible
HTTP HEAD request returns 404 Not Found; attempted alternative sitemap locations (sitemap, sitemap.xml.gz, sitemap_index.xml) also return 404; robots.txt also missing
Confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 31-34; this is a local directory path specification for the task environment
Confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 32-34 and export_result.sh line 12; this is a local file path specification for the task environment

privileged_info_summary: The target website books.toscrape.com is a real, publicly accessible demo website designed for web scraping practice (HTTP 200). However, the claimed sitemap URL https://books.toscrape.com/sitemap.xml does not exist (HTTP 404), nor do alternative sitemap file patterns. The task description acknowledges this possibility by stating 'If the site lacks a sitemap, document this failure in the report and instead generate a sitemap using the tool, or proceed with the crawl analysis noting the absence.' The local directory paths for exports and report files are standard specifications for the task environment. Data source is real (public website), not synthetic.
